description: 搜索引擎与全文检索命令模块，涵盖 Elasticsearch、Meilisearch、Algolia、OpenSearch 及搜索工具

commands.name: Elasticsearch Query DSL 高级查询
commands.keyword: es query DSL multi_match fuzzy prefix wildcard range
commands.description: Elasticsearch Query DSL 高级查询，包括 multi_match、fuzzy、prefix、wildcard、range 等

extensions.name: Multi-Match 多字段匹配
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"multi_match":{"query":"%{关键词}%","fields":["%{字段1}%^2","%{字段2}%"]}}}'

extensions.name: Fuzzy 模糊查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"fuzzy":{"%{字段名}%":{"value":"%{值}%","fuzziness":"AUTO"}}}}'

extensions.name: Prefix 前缀查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"prefix":{"%{字段名}%":"%{前缀}%"}}}'

extensions.name: Wildcard 通配符查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"wildcard":{"%{字段名}%":"%{模式}%"}}}'

模式.description: 通配符模式(* 任意, ? 单字符)

extensions.name: Range 范围查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"range":{"%{字段名}%":{"gte":%{最小}%,"lte":%{最大}%}}}}'

extensions.name: Exists 存在查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"exists":{"field":"%{字段名}%"}}}'

字段名.notes: 查询该字段存在且非空的文档

extensions.name: Script 脚本查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"script":{"script":{"source":"doc[''%{字段名}''].value > %{阈值}%","lang":"painless"}}}}'

extensions.name: IDS 查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"ids":{"values":["%{ID1}%","%{ID2}%","%{ID3}%"]}}}'

commands.name: Elasticsearch _cat 索引与分片
commands.keyword: es cat indices shards templates aliases recovery
commands.description: Elasticsearch _cat API 查看索引、分片、别名、恢复进度等

extensions.name: 查看所有索引
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/indices?v"

extensions.name: 查看分片详情
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/shards?v"

extensions.name: 查看索引模板
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/templates?v"

extensions.name: 查看别名
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/aliases?v"

extensions.name: 查看字段数据内存
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/fielddata?v"

extensions.name: 查看恢复进度
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/recovery?v"

extensions.name: 查看未分配分片
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/shards?v&h=index,shard,prirep,state,unassigned.reason"

commands.name: Elasticsearch 集群与节点高级操作
commands.keyword: es cluster nodes reroute tasks hot_threads settings
commands.description: Elasticsearch 集群管理、节点操作、任务管理、分片路由等

extensions.name: 节点堆内存信息
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cat/nodes?v&h=name,heap.current,heap.percent,heap.max"

extensions.name: 热点线程分析
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_nodes/hot_threads"

extensions.name: 获取集群设置
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_cluster/settings?flat_settings=true"

extensions.name: 更新集群设置
extensions.cmd: curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_cluster/settings" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"transient":{"%{设置项}%":"%{值}%"}}'

extensions.name: 手动分片分配
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_cluster/reroute" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"commands":[{"allocate_empty_primary":{"index":"%{索引名}%","shard":%{分片号}%,"node":"%{节点ID}%","accept_data_loss":true}}]}'

extensions.name: 查看运行任务
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_tasks?detailed=true&actions=*search"

extensions.name: 取消运行中任务
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_tasks/%{节点ID}%:%{任务ID}%/_cancel"

commands.name: Elasticsearch Painless 脚本
commands.description: Elasticsearch Painless 脚本用于文档更新、条件操作、数组处理等

data.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_update/%{文档ID}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":{"source":"%{脚本内容}%","lang":"painless","params":%{参数}%}}'

extensions.name: 字段自增
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_update/%{文档ID}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":{"source":"ctx._source.%{字段名}% += params.inc","lang":"painless","params":{"inc":%{增量}%}}}'

extensions.name: 条件更新
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_update/%{文档ID}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":{"source":"if (ctx._source.%{字段}% == params.old) { ctx._source.%{字段}% = params.new }","lang":"painless","params":{"old":"%{旧值}%","new":"%{新值}%"}}}'

extensions.name: 数组添加元素
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_update/%{文档ID}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":{"source":"ctx._source.%{数组字段}%.add(params.tag)","lang":"painless","params":{"tag":"%{标签}%"}}}'

extensions.name: 删除字段
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_update/%{文档ID}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":{"source":"ctx._source.remove(params.field)","lang":"painless","params":{"field":"%{字段名}%"}}}'

extensions.name: Bulk 批量脚本更新
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_bulk" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary '{"update":{"_index":"%{索引名}%","_id":"%{文档ID}%"}}\n{"script":{"source":"ctx._source.%{字段}% += %{增量}%","lang":"painless"}}\n'

commands.name: Elasticsearch ILM 索引生命周期管理
commands.keyword: es ilm lifecycle hot warm cold delete policy rollover
commands.description: Elasticsearch ILM 索引生命周期管理 — 热、暖、冷、删除阶段策略配置

extensions.name: 查看 ILM 策略
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/_ilm/policy/%{策略名}%"

extensions.name: 创建完整 ILM 策略
extensions.cmd: curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_ilm/policy/%{策略名}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"policy":{"phases":{"hot":{"min_age":"0ms","actions":{"rollover":{"max_age":"7d","max_size":"50gb"},"set_priority":{"priority":100}}},"warm":{"min_age":"30d","actions":{"shrink":{"number_of_shards":1},"forcemerge":{"max_num_segments":1},"allocate":{"number_of_replicas":0}}},"cold":{"min_age":"60d","actions":{"freeze":{}}},"delete":{"min_age":"90d","actions":{"delete":{}}}}}}}'

extensions.name: 应用策略到索引
extensions.cmd: curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_settings" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"settings":{"index.lifecycle.name":"%{策略名}%"}}'

extensions.name: 索引模板绑定策略
extensions.cmd: curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_index_template/%{模板名}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"index_patterns":["%{索引模式}%"],"template":{"settings":{"index.lifecycle.name":"%{策略名}%"}}}'

extensions.name: 查看索引 ILM 状态
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_ilm/explain"

commands.name: Meilisearch 启动与索引操作
commands.keyword: meilisearch 启动 index create list delete stats
commands.description: Meilisearch 启动配置及 CLI 索引操作。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

extensions.name: 默认启动 Meilisearch
extensions.cmd: meilisearch

extensions.name: 指定端口和密钥启动
extensions.cmd: meilisearch --http-addr 0.0.0.0:7700 --master-key "%{主密钥}%" --env production

extensions.name: Docker 启动 Meilisearch
extensions.cmd: docker run -d -p 7700:7700 -e MEILI_MASTER_KEY=%{主密钥}% -v /meili_data:/meili_data getmeili/meilisearch

extensions.name: 创建索引
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli index create --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --primary-key "%{主键}%"

extensions.name: 查看索引列表
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli index list

extensions.name: 获取索引统计
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli index stats --index-uid "%{索引UID}%"

extensions.name: 删除索引
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli index delete --index-uid "%{索引UID}%"

commands.name: Meilisearch 文档与搜索操作
commands.description: Meilisearch CLI 文档管理及搜索操作。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

data.cmd: meilisearch-cli documents add --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --file "%{文件路径}%"

extensions.name: 添加 JSON 文档
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli documents add --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --file "%{文件路径}%"

extensions.name: 条件删除文档
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli documents delete --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --filter "%{过滤条件}%"

extensions.name: 基础搜索
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli search "%{搜索词}%" --index-uid "%{索引UID}%"

extensions.name: 过滤+排序搜索
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli search "%{搜索词}%" --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --filter "%{过滤条件}%" --sort "%{排序规则}%"

extensions.name: 分面统计搜索
extensions.cmd: meilisearch-cli search "%{搜索词}%" --index-uid "%{索引UID}%" --facets "%{分面字段}%"

搜索词.notes: 空字符串表示聚合所有

commands.name: curl 操作 Meilisearch API
commands.keyword: curl meilisearch api health search documents
commands.description: 使用 curl 直接调用 Meilisearch REST API

data.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:7700/indexes/%{索引UID}%/search" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{API_KEY}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"q":"%{搜索词}%"}'

extensions.name: 健康检查
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:7700/health"

extensions.name: 获取版本信息
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:7700/version"

extensions.name: 创建索引
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:7700/indexes" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{API_KEY}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"uid":"%{索引UID}%","primaryKey":"%{主键}%"}'

extensions.name: 搜索文档
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:7700/indexes/%{索引UID}%/search" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{API_KEY}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"q":"%{搜索词}%","limit":%{限制}%}'

extensions.name: 添加文档
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:7700/indexes/%{索引UID}%/documents" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{API_KEY}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '%{文档JSON}%'

extensions.name: 获取任务状态
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "http://localhost:7700/tasks/%{任务ID}%" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{API_KEY}%"

任务ID.notes: 添加文档后返回的 taskUid

commands.name: Algolia CLI 操作
commands.description: Algolia CLI 索引管理、搜索、配置操作。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

extensions.name: 配置凭证
extensions.cmd: algolia configure --app-id %{APP_ID}% --api-key %{API_KEY}%

extensions.name: 列出所有索引
extensions.cmd: algolia list indices

extensions.name: 搜索记录
extensions.cmd: algolia index search --index %{索引名}% --query "%{搜索词}%" --hits %{条数}%

extensions.name: 配置可搜索属性
extensions.cmd: algolia index configure --index %{索引名}% --searchableAttributes "%{字段1}%,%{字段2}%,%{字段3}%"

extensions.name: 复制索引
extensions.cmd: algolia index copy --from %{源索引}% --to %{目标索引}%

extensions.name: 导入数据
extensions.cmd: algolia import %{索引名}% --file %{文件路径}% --batchSize %{批次大小}%

extensions.name: 设置同义词
extensions.cmd: algolia index synonyms --index %{索引名}% --synonyms '{"%{关键词}%":["%{同义词1}%","%{同义词2}%"]}'

commands.name: OpenSearch 启动与 CLI
commands.description: OpenSearch 启动配置及 CLI 操作。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

extensions.name: 单节点后台启动
extensions.cmd: ./opensearch -d -p pid

extensions.name: 指定集群和节点启动
extensions.cmd: ./opensearch -E cluster.name=%{集群名}% -E node.name=%{节点名}% -E network.host=0.0.0.0

extensions.name: Docker 单节点启动
extensions.cmd: docker run -d -p 9200:9200 -p 9600:9600 -e "discovery.type=single-node" opensearchproject/opensearch

extensions.name: 列出索引
extensions.cmd: opensearch-cli index list --endpoint %{端点}% --auth %{用户名}%:%{密码}%

extensions.name: 搜索查询
extensions.cmd: opensearch-cli search --index-name %{索引名}% --query-file %{查询文件}% --endpoint %{端点}% --auth %{用户名}%:%{密码}%

查询文件.description: 查询 JSON 文件路径

extensions.name: 集群健康检查
extensions.cmd: opensearch-cli cluster health --endpoint %{端点}% --auth %{用户名}%:%{密码}%

commands.name: OpenSearch 特有 API
commands.description: OpenSearch 特有 API — SQL 查询、PIT、异步搜索等

data.cmd: curl -X POST "https://localhost:9200/_plugins/_query/sql" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}% -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"%{SQL语句}%"}'

extensions.name: SQL 查询
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "https://localhost:9200/_plugins/_query/sql" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}% -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"SELECT * FROM %{索引名}% LIMIT %{限制}%"}'

extensions.name: PIT 创建时间点
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "https://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_pit?keep_alive=%{保留时间}%" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}%

extensions.name: PIT 搜索
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "https://localhost:9200/_search" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}% -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"size":%{大小}%,"query":{"match":{"%{字段}%":"%{值}%"}},"pit":{"id":"%{PIT_ID}%","keep_alive":"%{保留时间}%"}}'

extensions.name: 异步搜索
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "https://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_async_search?wait_for_completion_timeout=%{超时}%" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}% -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"match_all":{}}}'

超时.notes: 超过则返回 search_id 供后续查询

extensions.name: 统计信息
extensions.cmd: curl -X GET "https://localhost:9200/_opensearch/stats?pretty" -k -u %{用户名}%:%{密码}%

commands.name: 搜索工具 curl 与数据同步
commands.keyword: curl search api sync reindex scroll bulk alias
commands.description: 通用搜索 API 的 curl 操作及数据同步、索引别名切换等

extensions.name: 带认证搜索请求
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "%{URL}%" -H "Authorization: Bearer %{TOKEN}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"q":"%{搜索词}%","limit":%{限制}%}'

extensions.name: 重试机制请求
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "%{URL}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"q":"%{搜索词}%"}' --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --max-time 30

extensions.name: NDJSON 文件批量导入
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_bulk" -H "Content-Type: application/x-ndjson" --data-binary "@%{文件路径}%"

extensions.name: Scroll 大数据遍历
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/%{索引名}%/_search?scroll=5m" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":{"match_all":{}},"size":%{批次大小}%}'

extensions.name: 零停机索引别名切换
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_aliases" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"actions":[{"remove":{"index":"%{旧索引}%","alias":"%{别名}%"}},{"add":{"index":"%{新索引}%","alias":"%{别名}%"}}]}'

extensions.name: Reindex 数据重建
extensions.cmd: curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_reindex" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"source":{"index":"%{源索引}%"},"dest":{"index":"%{目标索引}%"}}'

extensions.name: JSON 格式化输出
extensions.cmd: curl -s -X POST "%{URL}%" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"q":"%{搜索词}%"}' | jq '.'
